name: Honey Soy Baked Salmon
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Golden Dipt Fat Free Honey Soy Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the salmon fillets in a shallow dish.
2. Pour the marinade over the fillets and refrigerate for 15 minutes.
3. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
4. Bake the salmon fillets for 8-10 minutes per inch of thickness, or until the fish flakes easily with a fork.
5. Serves 4.
